title: Action Sheet Item
description: Represents an individual item in an action sheet. This interface defines the structure for action sheet items, including text, icons, colors, and interaction callbacks.

sections.title: Interface Definition
sections.description: Structure of an action sheet item.

props.name: name
props.description: Optional name identifier for the action sheet item.

props.name: text
props.description: The text content to display for this action sheet item.

props.name: icon
props.description: Optional icon to display alongside the text content.

props.name: disabled
props.description: Whether this action sheet item is disabled and cannot be interacted with.

props.name: color
props.description: Optional color styling for the action sheet item.

props.name: onClick
props.description: Optional callback function to execute when this item is clicked.

props.name: suffix
props.description: Optional suffix object containing additional text to display after the main text.

props.name: break
props.description: Whether to add a visual break or separator after this item.

props.name: group
props.description: Optional group information for organizing items into sections.
